title: The Rite Disputed
intro: A rite your coven recovered turns out to be claimed by two cults at once: the Purple say it is chaos-work and theirs by blood, the White that it is an ordering-rite and theirs by right. Both have sent for it, and neither will take a refusal warmly.

advisors.text: It is Purple to the bone, Archon — read how it bends. Give it to the Pavilion and make a friend who dances. Give it to the White and make one who audits.
It is an ordering-rite dressed as chaos. The White Tower will owe us for its return. The Purple will forget the slight by next season, as they forget everything.

choices.label: Give the rite to the Purple Pavilion

win.text: The Purple carry the rite off in delight and count Runehold kin — while the White Tower files the loss in its long, cool memory.
win.saga: You gave the disputed rite to the Purple Pavilion, winning its delight and the White Tower's quiet displeasure.

choices.label: Give the rite to the White Tower

win.text: The White receive the rite with grave thanks and a debt acknowledged — while the Purple shrug, and remember, in their way.
win.saga: You gave the disputed rite to the White Tower, earning its gratitude and a debt, and the Purple's careless grudge.

win.text: You make the case that a rite recovered is a rite kept, and make it so well that both cults grumble and grant it. Runehold keeps its find.
win.saga: You argued Runehold's right to keep the disputed rite so ably that both Purple and White grumbled and let it lie.

lose.text: Your claim convinces no one, and now both cults are sure Runehold is a hoarder. You keep the rite and lose the goodwill.
lose.saga: Your claim to keep the disputed rite convinced neither cult; Runehold kept its find and lost face with Purple and White both.
